devices.description: Current-gen all-in-one Android register with built-in printer.
PayPoint platform running Android POS apps.
22" PayPoint for Android with integrated printer.
Compact open-frame / kiosk touchscreen — attach peripherals.
Current I-Series touchscreen — common retail register display.
Legacy I-Series 2 — still in many stores.
Elo mobile tablet for line-busting / mobile checkout.
Current-generation I-Series 5 — common new retail deployments.
Second-generation PayPoint Plus 15" with integrated printer.
Second-generation PayPoint Plus 22" with integrated printer.
X-Series open-frame touch monitor for POS builds.
24" Elo touch monitor — counter register display.
Landi Android SmartPOS often used as the main register with browser POS.
Current Landi A9 flagship Android device.
Landi C20 Pro countertop Android — register + payment in one.
Landi N950S Android payment terminal used as mobile register.
15.6" Sunmi Android POS — very common open-stack register.
T2s with upgraded specs and dual display option.
Budget Sunmi T2s Lite countertop POS.
Current Sunmi T3 generation Android POS.
Sunmi D3 Pro with built-in printer.
15" fanless Posiflex all-in-one — common independent retail.
Dell OptiPlex AIO running browser POS.
Small-form-factor Dell with separate touch display.
Lenovo ThinkCentre all-in-one for retail POS.
Compact Lenovo PC with touch monitor.
Partner Tech RP-330 receipt printer combo base.
Desktop or mini PC running the POS in a browser.
iPad running Business One in Safari — network connection required.
Countertop Android — HM Herbs Durango reference terminal.
Landi Android SmartPOS — very common processor-neutral deployment.
Landi A9 — current Landi flagship mobile.
Android DX8000 countertop — current Worldline flagship.
Sunmi P2 SmartPOS — popular with open POS stacks.
Sunmi P2 Pro with larger display.
ID Tech VP3350 Bluetooth mobile reader.
Best-selling Star receipt printer — USB or Ethernet.
Kitchen impact printer for multi-copy tickets.
TM-T88VI — still very common in stores.
Sam4s SPS-340 — common independent retail printer.
Budget 1D/2D imager — very common at checkout.
Legacy 1D laser — still in many stores.
Rugged Bluetooth scanner for mobile POS.
Legacy Symbol 1D laser — still widely deployed.
Any USB scanner that types into the POS.
APG NetPRO with network interface option.
RJ11 drawer connected to Star printer kick port.
Standard RJ11 cash drawer kicked from receipt printer.
Logic Controls LD9000 serial pole display.
USB label printer — very common for shelf and product labels.
QL-810W with Wi‑Fi — same QL series as the QL-800.
DYMO LabelWriter 550 USB / network label printer.
